finger.background: Well established in the universe as a professor and practioner of xenoarchaeology, Paul Nighman PhD has a rather varied reputation. As a scientist, he is one of the best in his field. But there are rumors that he dabbles in some less than savory pursuits as well, such as smuggling and other potentially illegal activities. Five years ago he went out to explore and study some newly discovered primitive culture planets out along the rim. He returned only upon hearing of the impending annexation of his home world and was caught three years ago aiding refugees on Corellia during the Imperial invasion and was imprisoned there. He recently was freed during a planetary rebellion prison break and has been trying to find employment and get back to his previous life.
